'''mofahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:robed|robed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-f-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:robed|robed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mofahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mofahithi|mofahithi]] || [[word:mofahiji|mofahiji]] || [[word:mofahishi|mofahishi]] || [[word:mofahiki|mofahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mofahuthuthu|mofahuthuthu]] || [[word:mofahujuju|mofahujuju]] || [[word:mofahushushu|mofahushushu]] || [[word:mofahukuku|mofahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mofahuthu|mofahuthu]] || [[word:mofahuju|mofahuju]] || [[word:mofahushu|mofahushu]] || [[word:mofahuku|mofahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mofahufthuf|mofahufthuf]] || [[word:mofahufjuf|mofahufjuf]] || [[word:mofahufshuf|mofahufshuf]] || [[word:mofahufkuf|mofahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mofahethe|mofahethe]] || [[word:mofaheje|mofaheje]] || [[word:mofaheshe|mofaheshe]] || [[word:mofaheke|mofaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mofahothotho|mofahothotho]] || [[word:mofahojojo|mofahojojo]] || [[word:mofahoshosho|mofahoshosho]] || [[word:mofahokoko|mofahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mofahotho|mofahotho]] || [[word:mofahojo|mofahojo]] || [[word:mofahosho|mofahosho]] || [[word:mofahoko|mofahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mofahofthof|mofahofthof]] || [[word:mofahofjof|mofahofjof]] || [[word:mofahofshof|mofahofshof]] || [[word:mofahofkof|mofahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mofahÃŸfthÃŸf|mofahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mofahÃŸfjÃŸf|mofahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mofahÃŸfshÃŸf|mofahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mofahÃŸfkÃŸf|mofahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mofahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|mofahÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mofahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|mofahÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mofahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|mofahÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mofahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|mofahÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mofahÃŸfthÃŸf|mofahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mofahÃŸfjÃŸf|mofahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mofahÃŸfshÃŸf|mofahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mofahÃŸfkÃŸf|mofahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mofahÃŸfthÃŸf|mofahÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mofahÃŸfjÃŸf|mofahÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mofahÃŸfshÃŸf|mofahÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mofahÃŸfkÃŸf|mofahÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mofahÃḊthÃḊ|mofahÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:mofahÃḊjÃḊ|mofahÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:mofahÃḊshÃḊ|mofahÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:mofahÃḊkÃḊ|mofahÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mofahathatha|mofahathatha]] || [[word:mofahajaja|mofahajaja]] || [[word:mofahashasha|mofahashasha]] || [[word:mofahakaka|mofahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mofahatha|mofahatha]] || [[word:mofahaja|mofahaja]] || [[word:mofahasha|mofahasha]] || [[word:mofahaka|mofahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mofahafthaf|mofahafthaf]] || [[word:mofahafjaf|mofahafjaf]] || [[word:mofahafshaf|mofahafshaf]] || [[word:mofahafkaf|mofahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mofahasha|mofahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mofahshÃḋsha|mofahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mofahrosha|mofahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mofahmusha|mofahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mofahyasha|mofahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomofahnkshÃḋsha|gomofahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomofahnkrosha|gomofahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomofahnkmusha|gomofahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomofahnkyasha|gomofahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mofafahasha|mofafahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mofafahshÃḋsha|mofafahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mofafahrosha|mofafahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mofafahmusha|mofafahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mofafahyasha|mofafahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomofafahnkshÃḋsha|gomofafahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomofafahnkrosha|gomofafahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomofafahnkmusha|gomofafahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomofafahnkyasha|gomofafahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:mefÃḊhasha|mefÃḊhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mefÃḊhshÃḋsha|mefÃḊhshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mefÃḊhrosha|mefÃḊhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mefÃḊhmusha|mefÃḊhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mefÃḊhyasha|mefÃḊhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomefÃḊhnkshÃḋsha|gomefÃḊhnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomefÃḊhnkrosha|gomefÃḊhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomefÃḊhnkmusha|gomefÃḊhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomefÃḊhnkyasha|gomefÃḊhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mofahasha|mofahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mofahshÃḋsha|mofahshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mofahrosha|mofahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mofahmusha|mofahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mofahyasha|mofahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomofahnkshÃḋsha|gomofahnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomofahnkrosha|gomofahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomofahnkmusha|gomofahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomofahnkyasha|gomofahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
